title: Belt - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by multiple deposits and swaps on BSC

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses flash loans followed by multiple deposits and swaps within the same transaction
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> multiple DEPOSIT and SWAP calls in single tx

red_flags: Use of flash loans for large-scale trading activities
monitoring_rules: BLOCK txs using flash loans followed by multiple deposits and swaps
summary: The hacker used flash loans to perform multiple deposits and swaps on BSC, exploiting the liquidity of the platforms. A guard could have blocked such transactions to prevent the exploit.
